ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
openSEPPO provides open-source tools for processing and managing geospatial
and SAR remote sensing data, with a focus on NASA NISAR products.
Includes RSLC subsetting (isce3/GAMMA/SEPPO compatible), conversion of NISAR GCOV
and GSLC HDF5 files to Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) or HDF5 subsets,
interferometric coherence estimation, Earthdata catalog search, and credential management.
The tools scale readily with the SEPPO software by Earth Big Data (https://earthbigdata.com/seppo).
about.summary: Open SEPPO Tools - Supporting Geospatial and Remote Sensing Data Processing

about.description:
openSEPPO provides open-source tools for processing and managing geospatial
and SAR remote sensing data, with a focus on NASA NISAR products.
Includes RSLC subsetting (isce3/GAMMA/SEPPO compatible), conversion of NISAR GCOV
and GSLC HDF5 files to Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) or HDF5 subsets,
interferometric coherence estimation, Earthdata catalog search, and credential management.
The tools scale readily with the SEPPO software by Earth Big Data (https://earthbigdata.com/seppo).
about.summary: Open SEPPO Tools - Supporting Geospatial and Remote Sensing Data Processing

name: openseppo
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "0.5.3" %}
{% set python_min = "3.12" %}

package:
  name: openseppo
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/EarthBigData/openSEPPO/archive/refs/tags/v{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 824f1177799ec74ddc3fceb6ebe679c61c5b815113d25bc1628883f8ce2cdcb9

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  entry_points:
    - seppo_nisar_search = openseppo.cli.nisar_search:main
    - seppo_earthaccess_credentials = openseppo.cli.earthaccess_credentials:main
    - seppo_nisar_gcov_convert = openseppo.cli.nisar_gcov_convert:main
    - seppo_nisar_gcov_convert_S = openseppo.cli.nisar_gcov_convert_S:main
    - seppo_nisar_gslc_convert = openseppo.cli.nisar_gslc_convert:main
    - seppo_nisar_coherence = openseppo.cli.nisar_coherence:main
    - seppo_nisar_rslc_convert = openseppo.cli.nisar_rslc_convert:main

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - hatchling
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - requests >=2.28
    - earthaccess >=0.8
    - h5py >=3.8
    - h5netcdf >=1.1
    - numpy >=1.24
    - rasterio >=1.3
    - s3fs >=2023.1
    - xarray >=2023.1
    - scipy >=1.10
    - pyproj >=3.5
  run_constrained:
    - aria2 >=1.35

test:
  imports:
    - openseppo
    - openseppo.nisar
    - openseppo.cli
  commands:
    - pip check
    - seppo_nisar_search --help
    - seppo_earthaccess_credentials --help
    - seppo_nisar_gcov_convert --help
    - seppo_nisar_gcov_convert_S --help
    - seppo_nisar_gslc_convert --help
    - seppo_nisar_coherence --help
    - seppo_nisar_rslc_convert --help
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: https://github.com/EarthBigData/openSEPPO
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Open SEPPO Tools - Supporting Geospatial and Remote Sensing Data Processing
  description: |
    openSEPPO provides open-source tools for processing and managing geospatial
    and SAR remote sensing data, with a focus on NASA NISAR products.
    Includes RSLC subsetting (isce3/GAMMA/SEPPO compatible), conversion of NISAR GCOV
    and GSLC HDF5 files to Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) or HDF5 subsets,
    interferometric coherence estimation, Earthdata catalog search, and credential management.
    The tools scale readily with the SEPPO software by Earth Big Data (https://earthbigdata.com/seppo).

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - jkellndorfer
